# Full Financial Report — March 2026

**Company:** ABC Company LLC
**Period:** March 1–31, 2026
**Generated by:** Reporting Agent
**Date:** April 1, 2026
**Report Version:** 1.0

---

## Executive Summary

March 2026 delivered the highest monthly revenue in company history at $90,570.00, representing 17.8% growth over February. Net income reached $19,522.86 (21.6% margin). Gross margins contracted slightly to 66.5% due to a 59.8% increase in COGS, driven primarily by inventory scaling and a sharp rise in shipping costs. Three reconciliation items remain open totaling $124.00 in unresolved variances.

---

## 1. Revenue Breakdown

| Channel | Amount | % of Total | MoM Change |
|---------|--------|------------|------------|
| Amazon Marketplace | $69,820.00 | 77.1% | +12.6% |
| eBay Marketplace | $10,650.00 | 11.8% | +22.4% |
| Shopify Direct | $10,100.00 | 11.1% | +62.9% |
| **Total Revenue** | **$90,570.00** | **100.0%** | **+17.8%** |

### Revenue Notes
- Amazon remains the dominant channel but eBay and Shopify are growing faster in percentage terms
- Shopify direct sales nearly doubled driven by Q1 promotional campaign
- Four Amazon payouts received (Mar 3, 14, 22, 29) totaling $69,820.00
- Two eBay payouts received (Mar 7, 20) totaling $10,650.00
- Three Shopify payouts received (Mar 8, 16, 25) totaling $10,100.00

## Notes

- Payroll increased $400/period reflecting one new warehouse associate hired February 15
- QuickBooks subscription added March 21 ($45/mo) — new accounting software rollout
- Shipping cost spike under investigation: March volume increased but cost-per-shipment also rose; carrier rate review scheduled for April
- Marketing spend tripled month-over-month due to spring product launch campaign across Google and Meta
